title: Medallions
description: A mod that adds a ton of new Medallion Items
body:
This mod contains Items called Medallions. These items give you different ability's. Right now, there only are seven items.
You can give yourself the items with commands, by typing in chat /function medallions:give/ and the item you want to get.
The item are crafted by anvil not by Crafting Table. You can find some new structures too.
You can find out more information by joining our discord and going to the info hub.

Discord: https://discord.gg/tFmT5NRw4m

**Credits:**

Programmer: capdelion

Designer and Builder: SussyBauarbeiter
